free_look_period.source_quote:
You/the insured shall be allowed a period of thirty days from date of receipt of the Policy document to review the 
terms and conditions of the Policy

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote:
Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be 
excluded except claims arising due to an accident

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote:
of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded 
until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

3. 
Specific Waiting Period: (Code- Excl02) 
a) 
Expenses related to the treatment of the following listed conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Pre-Hospitalization and Post Hospitalization expenses for 60 and 90 days respectively as defined under the 
Policy will also be reimbursed

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote:
Pre-Hospitalization and Post Hospitalization expenses for 60 and 90 days respectively as defined under the 
Policy will also be reimbursed

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (IFFCO Tokio family health insurance covers 380+ day care surgeries)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 8,000+ Network Hospitals ('Why Choose IFFCO-TOKIO' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: The following Co-pay options are available: 10%, 20% or 25% under the product.

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: refund proportionate premium for unexpired policy period, if the term of policy upto one year

ayush_coverage.source_quote:
AYUSH hospitalization expenses Incurred in AYUSH Hospitals or AYUSH Day Care Centres. Coverage also includes 
pre- hospitalization and post hospitalization expenses.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Hospitalization expenses of person donating an organ during the course of organ transplant will also be payable subject to the limit of overall Sum Insured of the Insured Person or floater Sum Insured of family.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote:
Domiciliary Hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course 
would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at home

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless facility means a facility extended by Us to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment 
undergone by the insured

geographic_coverage.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims shall be payable 
in Indian currency.
